nasb.text: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the reward of the inheritance. It is the Lord Christ whom you serve.

esv.text: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the inheritance as your reward. You are serving the Lord Christ.

cnv.text: 因為你們知道，你們一定會從主那裡得到基業為賞賜。你們應當服事主基督，

ccb.text: 因为你们知道自己一定会从主那里得到基业为奖赏。你们事奉的是主基督，

csbs.text: 因为你们知道，你们将要从主那里得到继业为报偿；你们当服事主基督。
